evals.prompt: Review this React component. It creates a new MapboxOverlay in render and passes initialViewState plus controller to the overlay. What is wrong and what is the correct pattern?
expectations: Identifies that MapboxOverlay should be created through react-map-gl useControl, not recreated in render
Explains that MapboxOverlay ignores or disallows deck.gl camera/controller props because Mapbox owns the camera
Shows the DeckOverlay helper pattern with useControl and overlay.setProps(props)

evals.prompt: I need Deck.gl points to render under Mapbox labels but above the land and water. Should I use interleaved, overlaid, or reverse-controlled mode?
expectations: Explains that interleaving inserts deck.gl layers into the Mapbox style stack
Mentions beforeId for classic styles and slot for Mapbox v3 Standard styles
Does not recommend reverse-controlled mode for this style-ordering use case

evals.prompt: In a React Mapbox app, when should I use DeckGL as the root instead of MapboxOverlay?
expectations: Recommends DeckGL root only when deck.gl must own controllers, pointer input, custom views, or widgets
States that Mapbox controls/plugins are not available in reverse-controlled DeckGL-root mode
Recommends MapboxOverlay for normal React Mapbox apps that need Mapbox controls and camera ownership
